message:
🐛 Fix acmm-badge test + RuntimeAttestation card loading (#10037) (#10041)

* 1. acmm-badge.test.ts: Add missing ACMM_DETECTION_PATHS to mock —
   direct GitHub fallback could not map file paths to scannable IDs.

   instead of bare isLoading in useCardLoadingState, per gold standard.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

* 🌱 Bump hex color ratchet for Flatcar card (PR #9941)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

---------

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -95,11 +95,13 @@ export function RuntimeAttestationCard() {
     lastRefresh,
   } = useCachedAttestation()
 
+  const hasAnyData = (data.clusters || []).length > 0
+
   useCardLoadingState({
-    isLoading,
+    isLoading: isLoading && !hasAnyData,
     isRefreshing,
     isDemoData,
-    hasAnyData: (data.clusters || []).length > 0,
+    hasAnyData,
     isFailed,
     consecutiveFailures,
     lastRefresh,
